prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny feature task without waiting for more user input. Add a subtract helper, cover it with tests, update README.md, choose the minimum required specialist handoffs yourself, run pytest -q, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The task completes end to end without asking the user which agent to use
The transcript shows manager-style planning and delegation output
Tests pass and README.md is updated
The final response includes the required footer
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
